articles.title: North Karnataka rain: Showers bring relief after heatwave surge - Deccan Herald

articles.full_text:
Rain respite from scorching heat in north Karnataka
Koppal recorded the highest temperature of 42.4º Celsius, followed by Kalaburagi at 39.9º Celsius.
